title: sannantha crenulata
intro: Sannantha crenulata, also known as the 'native pepper', is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and fruits, which contain essential oils that have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, due to its active compounds such as limonene and geraniol. Sannantha crenulata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or extract, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
